description: Consumer group resource. Persistent broker resource (evbk_consumer_group). Two creation paths: anonymous (broker-minted UUID via POST /v1/consumer-groups) and named (vendor-namespaced via types_registry upsert).

id.description: Full GTS consumer-group identifier. Broker-minted for anonymous groups; registered via types_registry for named groups. Always server-set — clients MUST NOT supply this field on creation.

tenant_id.description: Owner tenant (from SecurityContext at create time). Non-overridable.

owner_principal_id.description: Creator principal (from SecurityContext at create time). For named groups, this is the registering module's principal. Non-overridable.

kind.description: Group kind — derived from id-instance shape, stored for fast filtering.

CreateRequest.description: Request body for POST /v1/consumer-groups. The broker mints the identifier server-side; this body MUST NOT carry an id.

client_agent.description: RFC 9110 User-Agent grammar; ASCII; 1-256 bytes. Diagnostic hint surfaced in operational logs. No broker-side semantic beyond logging.
